raw_candidates.description:
# NAVI confirm ComeBack as stand-in until ExiT receives visa

Published: 2026-04-15T13:05:01+02:00

## Summary

Natus Vincere has confirmed that its VALORANT roster will continue competing at VCT 2026: EMEA Stage 1 with a substitute player named "ComeBack" due to visa issues. The club is working on resolving these issues. .

## Story

NAVI confirm ComeBack as stand-in until ExiT receives visa # NAVI confirm ComeBack as stand-in until ExiT receives visa 15.04.2026 Сергій Таран Natus Vincere have officially confirmed that their VALORANT roster will continue competing at VCT 2026: EMEA Stage 1 with a substitute player. Berkcan “ComeBack” Şentürk will temporarily join the team as a stand-in. Abdullah “ExiT” Al-Tuwaijri is currently facing visa issues and is unable to attend matches taking place in Berlin, Germany. The club stated that they are continuing to work on resolving the player’s documentation. NAVI have already played two matches at VCT 2026: EMEA Stage 1 and currently hold a 1–1 record. In those matches, the team used Herman “Kolosha” Skrypka as a stand-in. Previously, ComeBack played for teams such as BBL PCIFIC, Gentle Mates, and Team Heretics. Reminder: stavn has been signed by Ninjas in Pyjamas as the team’s new AWPer. Теми: Subscribe to our Telegram and Twitter to keep up to date with the latest news from the world of gaming and eSports ## Recent News stavn has been signed by NIP as the team’s new AWPer NAVI Junior reach playoffs of VALORANT Challengers 2026 NORTH//EAST: Stage 2 Ukraine national team reaches playoffs of FIFAe Nations League Week 1 ## Comments Comments are closed. Players is a modern media about Ukrainian and global esports. About games, players, and for players. Made in Kyiv with ❤️ News, columns and podcasts — news@players.com.ua Advertising and partnerships — adv@players.com.ua Serhiy Taran (Editor-in-Chief) — sergey@players.com.ua Iryna Barysheva (Publisher) — iryna@players.com.ua Anton Mazai (Publisher and CTO) — anton@players.com.ua © 2021-2026 Players. When using materials from the site, a hyperlink to the original article's location page with the Players publication is required.

## Entities

### Companies

- Navient Corporation
